title: cyrtomium macrosorum
intro: Cyrtomium macrosorum, also known as the Giant Holly Fern, is a type of evergreen fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyrtomium macrosorum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, and capsules, or used as a raw ingredient in traditional remedies.
